_doc: Source-of-truth profile for the Palmetto Superfoods Austin store. Single point of configuration consumed by BHAGA's orchestrator (M3 daily_refresh.py) and all skills it calls. See agents/bhaga/knowledge-base/store-profiles/README.md (TODO) for the schema reference.
_doc_google_account_key: Matches the key in core/config.yaml accounts.{key}. Determines which Google credentials refresh_access_token() uses.

timezone._doc: Square account display TZ is Eastern; Austin shop is Central. transactions_backend.parse_csv() does the conversion via zoneinfo. ADP times are already shop-local (no conversion needed).

shop_hours._doc: Used by the orchestrator to schedule the daily refresh AFTER all clock-outs. Refresh fires at close + ORCHESTRATOR_SCRAPE_BUFFER_MINUTES_AFTER_SHOP_CLOSE (60 min) -> 22:00 CT.

bhaga_review_raw._doc: Per-review audit trail populated by process_reviews.py. Source data for the review_bonus_period rollup tab on bhaga_model.

clickup._doc: Source channel where the upstream Google-review automation posts each new review. Read by skills/clickup_chat via PAT in Keychain.

square._doc: Keychain handle resolved via skills/credentials. Browser-automation login (no API access today). Account email: adi@mypalmetto.co.

adp_run._doc: wage_rate_report_name is the saved custom report under Reports > My saved custom reports. compensation_backend uses this to find the right report row to click.

employees._doc: Aliases map raw_name (as it appears in EITHER Timecard XLSX or Earnings XLSX) -> canonical_name. We use the comma form 'LastName, FirstName' as the canonical because it's the form ADP uses everywhere except the time-tracking module. Every employee MUST have entries for both forms to ensure the model-sheet join works.
employees._doc_exclusions: Lindsay is the store manager. She IS paid hourly ($25/hr) per ADP, but is excluded from labor% (we don't count manager cost against store sales) and from the tip pool (managers don't take from tips per policy). Exclusion is by canonical name, NOT by salaried flag.

labor_config._doc: Store-specific seed default. Palmetto's throughput wall is ~4 orders/hourly-labor-hour (one order every 15 labor-minutes per barista). The code default of 10 is for a generic fast-paced shop; Palmetto's specialty drinks take longer. Operator can still override in-sheet; subsequent refreshes preserve the in-sheet value.
labor_config._doc_forecast_target_completion_time_per: Flat, configurable staffing-solver target (seconds per item) — 420 = 7 min/item. Drives forecast efficiency_hours and the operational kds_pct_items_over_goal threshold. Editable in-sheet (config tab) AND per forecast row (labor_daily_forecast.target_time_per_item_sec). NOT derived from observed KDS — observed KDS time is purely operational/observational and never feeds the solver.

calibration.verified_by: Cursor AI agent (Opus 4.7) via user-playwright MCP + Google API direct.

first_data_window._doc: Initial historical backfill window. After this is loaded and validated, the orchestrator switches to T-1 daily increments.

notes: Square Transactions report scraping calibrated against app.squareup.com/dashboard/sales/transactions. 2956 txns / $47,946.77 collected / $2,527.21 tips over the backfill window.
ADP Timecard report scraping calibrated against Reports > Time reports > Timecard. 606 punch rows / 14 employees / 5 pay periods (Mar 9 - May 16, 2026; selected period over-covers the data window).
ADP Earnings and Hours V1 (custom saved report) calibrated. 116 earning lines / 12 employees in the data window. 11 staff @ $15.25/hr; Lindsay Krause @ $25/hr (hourly, not salaried).
Google Sheets workbooks created at My Drive root > BHAGA folder. All 3 workbooks seeded with headers + notes. Ready for tip_ledger_writer (M1 task remaining) to land data.
